location.href.indexOf('#') !== -1 ? '#' : location.hash;window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery = location.search === '' && location.href.slice(0, location.href.length - window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash.length).indexOf('?') !== -1 ? '?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=d0nl.GlBuYbMBdCgiNCtlUOTa1WRn0WjRuQ0Q.SSW_Q-1770287293-1.0.1.1-2WxBQtrh2IjG5wKGWd7VdgjfHYC7sMuSonlqLVKyQJE"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
